asset.title: Research Enrichment
asset.purpose: Silent workflow preview generated from app captures or trace replays. Judge whether it communicates the workflow and gate clearly.

judge.summary: The preview effectively demonstrates the research enrichment workflow, showing the transition from pending to completed states with updated sources and trace logs.

featureClarity.evidence: The interface clearly displays the 'Research' tab and the enrichment of company profiles.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Demonstrates the full sequence from pending status to completed enrichment with populated sources.

visualDesign.evidence: Clean dark-mode layout, though the dense information density makes it look slightly cluttered.

consistency.evidence: Integrates the chat, research panel, agent notes, and execution trace seamlessly.

evidenceQuality.evidence: Authentic UI capture showing real-time state changes and log updates.

legibility.evidence: Small font sizes in the trace log and chat sidebar require close attention to read.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Highly relevant for automated research and data enrichment use cases.

productionHonesty.evidence: The UI state changes correspond directly with the trace logs shown at the bottom.

observedEvidence: Status transition from pending to complete

defects.observed: The text in the Room Trace and chat panels is quite small and may be hard to read on smaller screens.
defects.fix: Increase the default font size or zoom level slightly during recording.

judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Watch NodeRoom enrich company profiles in real-time, updating structured fields and logging agent actions in the room trace.
